violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. 3 door reach in cooler noted above 41 degrees F. All dairy and other perishable product was moved to a cooler at proper temps.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling tiles noted with wet stains and/or damaged.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Carpeting noted being used on a prtion of the establishment on the east side.
